heading: Omitted
label: 1183 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for judgment funds to be distributed in equal shares to those persons whose names appeared on the roll, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 90–508, § 382 Stat. 862Sept. 21, 1968
